detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TheFlowerOfSakura._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#663-787):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#929)
	TheFlowerOfSakura._rOwned (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheFlowerOfSakura._takeTeam(uint256) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#941-949)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#901-937)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura.balanceOf(address) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#489-493)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura.constructor() (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#955)
	TheFlowerOfSakura._rTotal (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheFlowerOfSakura._getCurrentSupply() (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#1097-1107)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#953-959)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura.constructor() (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#423-453)
	- TheFlowerOfSakura.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TheFlowerOfSakura.sol#585-607)
